title: Mock Test 37 - Indirect Speech (Reported Speech)
description: এই টেস্টে Indirect Speech (পরোক্ষ উক্তি/Reported Speech) নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন রয়েছে। প্রথম কয়েকটি প্রশ্নে জানবো নিয়ম ও গঠন, তারপর fill in the blanks, error detection ও অনুবাদ দিয়ে উদাহরণ সহ শেখা। প্রতিটি প্রশ্নের বাংলা অর্থ ও বিস্তারিত ব্যাখ্যা দেওয়া আছে।

questions.question: Indirect Speech-এ সাধারণত কী পরিবর্তন হয়?
options: Tense backshift, pronoun change, adverb change — সবই হয়
questions.explanation: Indirect Speech-এ তিনটি প্রধান পরিবর্তন হয়: (1) Tense backshift (Present → Past), (2) Pronoun change (I → he/she), (3) Adverb change (now → then, here → there)।

questions.question: Direct Speech-কে Indirect Speech-এ রূপান্তর করলে 'said'-এর পরে কী বসে?
questions.explanation: Indirect Speech-এ 'said' বা 'told'-এর পরে সাধারণত 'that' বসে। যেমন: He said that he was busy। (কথ্য ভাষায় 'that' বাদ দেওয়া যায়)

questions.question: Indirect Speech-এ Present Indefinite কোন tense-এ রূপান্তরিত হয়?
questions.explanation: Backshift rule: Present Indefinite → Past Indefinite। 'He said, "I eat rice."' → 'He said that he ate rice.'

questions.question: Indirect Speech-এ 'will'-এর কী পরিবর্তন হয়?
questions.explanation: Backshift-এ 'will' → 'would' হয়। 'He said, "I will come."' → 'He said that he would come.'

questions.question: Indirect Speech-এ 'now' কী হয়?
questions.explanation: সময়সূচক adverb পরিবর্তন: now → then, today → that day, tomorrow → the next day, yesterday → the previous day।

questions.question: Direct: He said, "I am tired." → Indirect: He said that ___ tired.
questions.explanation: 'I' → 'he', 'am' (Present) → 'was' (Past)। 'He said that he was tired.'

questions.question: Direct: She said, "I have finished my work." → Indirect: She said that ___.
questions.explanation: Present Perfect (have finished) → Past Perfect (had finished)। 'I' → 'she', 'my' → 'her'। 'She said that she had finished her work.'

questions.question: Direct: He said, "I will call you." → Indirect: He said that ___.
questions.explanation: 'Will' → 'would', 'I' → 'he', 'you' → 'me'। 'He said that he would call me.'

questions.question: Direct: "Are you coming?" he asked. → Indirect: He asked ___.
questions.explanation: Yes/no question → 'if/whether' + statement word order। Tense backshift: 'are coming' → 'was coming'। 'He asked if I was coming.'

questions.question: Direct: "Where do you live?" she asked. → Indirect: She asked ___.
questions.explanation: Wh-question → wh-word + statement word order + backshift। 'do you live' → 'I lived'। 'She asked where I lived.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'He said that I am happy.' — যদি Reporting Verb past tense-এ হয়, তাহলে ভুল কী?
questions.explanation: Reporting verb 'said' past tense-এ, তাই 'am' → 'was' হবে। সঠিক: 'He said that he was happy.' (universal truth হলে am থাকতে পারে)

questions.question: Error Detection: 'She told that she was coming.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: 'Told' এর পরে object লাগে। 'She told me' বা 'She said' হবে। সঠিক: 'She said that she was coming.' বা 'She told me that she was coming.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'He asked that where I lived.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: Wh-question-এ Indirect Speech-এ 'that' ব্যবহার হয় না। সঠিক: 'He asked where I lived.'

questions.question: Error Detection: 'She said, that she was tired.' — ভুল অংশ কোনটি?
questions.explanation: Indirect Speech-এ comma ব্যবহার হয় না। সঠিক: 'She said that she was tired.' (কমা বাদ)

questions.question: Fill in the blank: He said that he ___ (go) to school every day.
questions.explanation: Direct: "I go to school every day." → Indirect: He said that he went to school every day. (Present → Past)

questions.question: Fill in the blank: She told me that she ___ (finish) the project already.
questions.explanation: Direct: "I have finished the project." → Present Perfect → Past Perfect (had finished)। 'She told me that she had finished the project already.'

questions.question: Fill in the blank: He said that he ___ (can) swim.
questions.explanation: Modal backshift: can → could। 'He said that he could swim.' (May → might, Will → would)

questions.question: Fill in the blank: The teacher said that the earth ___ (go) around the sun.
questions.explanation: Universal truth/fact → tense backshift হয় না। 'The earth goes around the sun' — সর্বদা সত্য, তাই 'goes'। 'The teacher said that the earth goes around the sun.'

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক Indirect Speech কোনটি? 'সে বলল, আমি ভাত খাই।'
options: He said that I eat rice.
He said that he ate rice.
He said that he eats rice.
questions.explanation: Direct: "I eat rice." → Indirect: He said that he ate rice. ('I' → 'he', Present 'eat' → Past 'ate')

questions.question: বাংলা বাক্যটির সঠিক Indirect Speech কোনটি? 'সে বলল, আমি আগামীকাল আসব।'
options: He said that he will come tomorrow.
He said that he would come the next day.
He said that he would come tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Direct: "I will come tomorrow." → Indirect: He said that he would come the next day. ('will' → 'would', 'tomorrow' → 'the next day')
